  python version: 3.10.12
  numpy version:  1.26.4
  gradient_descent() seeks the minimizer of a function
  using the method of gradient descent.

gradient_descent_linear_test():
  gradient_descent_linear() approximates the solution of a linear
  problem A*x=b, by minimizing ||Ax-b|| using gradient descent.

  Learning rate =  0.02
  Stepsize tolerance =  1e-06
  Maximum iterations =  10000

  Number of iterations =  9999
  Estimated solution:
[ 61.27030372 -39.05883784]
  Exact solution:
[ 61.272 -39.062]

  ||x-x_exact||   =  0.003588404159077953
  ||A*x-b||       =  2.7368885715508395
  ||A*x_exact-b|| =  2.73688879364872
